osx.command: venv='${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}'; if [ ! -x "$venv/bin/python" ] || ! "$venv/bin/python" -c 'import sys' >/dev/null 2>&1; then rm -rf "$venv" && python -m venv "$venv"; fi && "$venv/bin/python" -m pip install -r requirements.txt

windows.command: $venv = '${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}'; $venvPython = Join-Path $venv 'Scripts\python.exe'; if (!(Test-Path $venvPython)) { python -m venv $venv }; & $venvPython -c 'import sys'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $venv; python -m venv $venv }; & $venvPython -m pip install -r requirements.txt

linux.command: venv='${config:azureFunctions.pythonVenv}'; if [ ! -x "$venv/bin/python" ] || ! "$venv/bin/python" -c 'import sys' >/dev/null 2>&1; then rm -rf "$venv" && python -m venv "$venv"; fi && "$venv/bin/python" -m pip install -r requirements.txt
